---
title: "Aadil Rasheed"
subtitle: "Developer · Researcher · Writer"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-section}
## Hi, I'm Aadil Rasheed 👋

I'm a [your role here] passionate about [your interests]. I write about [topics] and build [projects].

[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}  [Read My Blog](posts/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

---

## Featured Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Project One
Brief description of your first project. What problem it solves and what technologies you used.

[GitHub](https://github.com){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Project Two
Brief description of your second project. What problem it solves and what technologies you used.

[GitHub](https://github.com){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Project Three
Brief description of your third project. What problem it solves and what technologies you used.

[GitHub](https://github.com){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::

---

## Recent Posts

Check out my [blog](posts/index.qmd) for the latest articles on [your topics].

---

## Get in Touch

- **Email**: Aadilcifer@icloud.com
- **GitHub**: [github.com/Acifer](https://github.com/Acifer)
- **Twitter**: [@Aadilcifer](https://twitter.com/Aadilcifer)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/your-username](https://linkedin.com/in/your-username)
